Class Draw

java.lang.Object
org.obsidium.graphics.Draw
public class Draw extends Object
A class with only static members that is used for drawing shapes to the window or a surface.
Since:
1.0

  • Method Details

    • fill

      public static void fill(Window window, Color color)
      Fills the window with a specified color.
      Parameters:
      window -
      color -
      Since:
      1.0

    • fill

      public static void fill(Surface surface, Color color)
      Fills the surface with a specified color.
      Parameters:
      surface -
      color -
      Since:
      1.0

    • rect

      public static void rect(Window window, int x, int y, int width, int height, Color color)
      Draws a rectangle on the window.
      Parameters:
      window -
      x - the x-coordinate, relative to the window, where you want to draw the rectangle
      y - the y-coordinate, relative to the window, where you want to draw the rectangle
      width - the width of the rectangle
      height - the height of the rectangle
      color - the color of the rectangle
      Since:
      1.0

    • rect

      public static void rect(Surface surface, int x, int y, int width, int height, Color color)
      Draws a rectangle on the surface.
      Parameters:
      surface -
      x - the x-coordinate, relative to the surface, where you want to draw the rectangle
      y - the y-coordinate, relative to the surface, where you want to draw the rectangle
      width - the width of the rectangle
      height - the height of the rectangle
      color - the color of the rectangle
      Since:
      1.0

    • circle

      public static void circle(Window window, int x, int y, int r, Color color)
      Draws a circle on the window.
      Parameters:
      window -
      x - the x-coordinate, relative to the window, where you want to draw the circle
      y - the y-coordinate, relative to the window, where you want to draw the circle
      r - the radius of the circle
      color - the color of the circle
      Since:
      1.0

    • circle

      public static void circle(Surface surface, int x, int y, int r, Color color)
      Draws a circle on the surface.
      Parameters:
      surface -
      x - the x-coordinate, relative to the surface, where you want to draw the circle
      y - the y-coordinate, relative to the surface, where you want to draw the circle
      r - the radius of the circle
      color - the color of the circle
      Since:
      1.0

    • polygon

      public static void polygon(Window window, int[] xPoints, int[] yPoints, Color color)
      Draws a filled in polygon on the window.

      The amount of x-coordinates of the points have to match to amount of y-coordinates.

      Parameters:
      window -
      xPoints - the x-coordinates of the points where the x-coordinates are relative to the window
      yPoints - the y-coordinates of the points where the y-coordinates are relative to the window
      color - the color of the polygon
      Since:
      1.0

    • polygon

      public static void polygon(Surface surface, int[] xPoints, int[] yPoints, Color color)
      Draws a filled in polygon on the surface.

      The amount of x-coordinates of the points have to match to amount of y-coordinates.

      Parameters:
      surface -
      xPoints - the x-coordinates of the points where the x-coordinates are relative to the surface
      yPoints - the y-coordinates of the points where the y-coordinates are relative to the surface
      color - the color of the polygon
      Since:
      1.0

    • line

      public static void line(Window window, int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, float thickness, Color color)
      Draws a line to the window.
      Parameters:
      window -
      x1 - the first x-coordinate that is relative to the window
      y1 - the first y-coordinate that is relative to the window
      x2 - the second x-coordinate that is relative to the window
      y2 - the second y-coordinate that is relative to the window
      thickness - the thickness of the line in pixels
      color - the color of the line
      Since:
      1.0

    • line

      public static void line(Window window, int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, Color color)
      Draws a line to the window with a thickness of 1.
      Parameters:
      window -
      x1 - the first x-coordinate that is relative to the window
      y1 - the first y-coordinate that is relative to the window
      x2 - the second x-coordinate that is relative to the window
      y2 - the second y-coordinate that is relative to the window
      color - the color of the line
      Since:
      1.0

    • line

      public static void line(Surface surface, int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, float thickness, Color color)
      Draws a line to the surface.
      Parameters:
      surface -
      x1 - the first x-coordinate that is relative to the surface
      y1 - the first y-coordinate that is relative to the surface
      x2 - the second x-coordinate that is relative to the surface
      y2 - the second y-coordinate that is relative to the surface
      thickness - the thickness of the line in pixels
      color - the color of the line
      Since:
      1.0

    • line

      public static void line(Surface surface, int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, Color color)
      Draws a line to the surface with a thickness of 1.
      Parameters:
      surface -
      x1 - the first x-coordinate that is relative to the surface
      y1 - the first y-coordinate that is relative to the surface
      x2 - the second x-coordinate that is relative to the surface
      y2 - the second y-coordinate that is relative to the surface
      color - the color of the line
      Since:
      1.0
